mandate: Wire draft adoption tracking into sendReplyAction and import ChurnIndicator into InsightsView
keyFindings: Draft adoption tracking compares AI-generated draft text against the actually-sent reply to measure edit distance

whatFailed: Nothing failed. Testament was not written at sunset (retroactive).
